label: Layout
name: layout
description: Structural layout of the textual content on the page.

prose.description: Continuous running text without strong structural segmentation.

columns.description: Text arranged in multiple vertical columns, typical for newspapers.

list.description: Entries arranged in a vertical list of discrete items.

table.description: Tabular structure with rows and columns.

form.description: Structured form with predefined fields to be filled.

index.description: Alphabetically or systematically ordered entries with references.

directory.description: Structured listings of people, organizations, or places, often repeating entry patterns.
